// Code generated by simplemock. DO NOT EDIT.
package main

func _[K comparable, V any]() { var _ Pair[K, V] = &PairMock[K, V]{} }

type PairMock[K comparable, V any] struct {
	KeyFunc func() K
	ValFunc func() V
}

func (m *PairMock[K, V]) Key() K {
	if m.KeyFunc != nil {
		return m.KeyFunc()
	}
	panic("Key called with nil KeyFunc!")
}

func (m *PairMock[K, V]) Val() V {
	if m.ValFunc != nil {
		return m.ValFunc()
	}
	panic("Val called with nil ValFunc!")
}
